data.description: Tehran has informed mediators it plans to dispatch a negotiating team to Islamabad today, WSJ reports citing sources.

data.title: LTC set to hit $58-60 in 14 days, as neutral RSI at 51 & 68% long positions signal imminent surge.
data.description: With Litecoin currently seeing a neutral RSI at 51 and zero MACD divergence, there are indications of a potential significant upward movement. Smart money is heavily positioned at 68% long, hinting at a likely breakthrough in the range of $58 to $60 in the upcoming two weeks.

data.title: ATOM price to hover around $1.65 before possible breakout. Investors wait for 15-20% move in 10 days.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos is currently in a distribution phase as large investors, known as whales, are taking long positions while smaller retail investors are being pushed out of the market. Despite appearing technically neutral, there is a significant accumulation of pressure indicating a potential price movement of 15-20% in the next 10 days.

data.title: NY Assemblyman Bores suggests AI dividend tax to aid Americans hit by automation, by taxing AI firms for direct payments.
data.description: Assemblyman Alex Bores of New York has introduced a proposal to impose taxes on artificial intelligence (AI) corporations with the aim of providing dividends to American citizens who are experiencing job loss due to automation. Under the plan, AI companies would be subject to a specified tax rate, and the revenue generated would be distributed among impacted individuals. This initiative is designed to assist US citizens who are facing displacement from employment as a result of technological advancements.

data.title: BCH price could hit $465 in 10 days despite whales going long. Smart money goes long as retail sells. Chance of breakout above $451 resistance at 65%.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently trading at $442, with significant activity from smart investors going long while retail traders are selling off their positions. The current technical analysis suggests a potential breakout above the $451 resistance level, with a 65% likelihood of reaching a target price.

data.title: Sparrow to Demonstrate AI-Driven Security and SBOM Management at Black Hat Asia 2026
data.description: A software security company named Sparrow Co., Ltd. has disclosed its involvement in Black Hat Asia 2026, occurring from April 21 to April 24 at the Marina Bay Sands Expo and Convention Centre in Singapore. Specializing in application security testing and safeguarding software supply chains, Sparrow Co., Ltd. will be participating in the event.
Wintrust Financial sees Jefferies increase its target price to $185 from $170.

data.title: First Mold Announces Moderate Price Adjustment Amid Global Chemical Raw Material Surge
data.description: In Zhongshan, China on April 21, 2026, the shutdown of the Strait of Hormuz followed by a subsequent decrease in ship traffic carrying oil has had a profound impact on various industries, particularly plastic injection molding. This disruption has affected approximately 5% of the world's oil, which is crucial for producing plastics.

data.title: UNI price set to drop to $2.70 in 72 hours, as DeFi sell-off intensifies with support lost at $3.26, eyeing $3.00 break.
data.description: The technical structure of UNI is deteriorating as it crashes to $3.26, indicating significant weakness. The crucial support level is faltering, signaling a potential further decline towards $2.70. The next significant drop is anticipated once the psychological barrier at $3.00 is breached.
China removes deputy head of financial regulator from position, according to Xinhua.

data.title: Coinbase introduces Agentic.Market for AI agents to buy services using x402 stablecoin, backed by Google & Microsoft.
data.description: Coinbase has introduced Agentic.Market, an online platform where AI agents can browse and buy services utilizing the x402 stablecoin payment protocol. This initiative is supported by tech giants Google and Microsoft. This move marks a significant advancement in the AI industry, offering a seamless way for agents to access and pay for services.

data.title: H2O.ai Showcases Safe, Secure, and Responsible AI Innovation for Government at Australian Government Data Summit 2026
data.description: H2O.ai, a renowned provider of enterprise Agentic AI solutions, has revealed its involvement in the Australian Government Data Summit. This move highlights the company's dedication to offering secure, sovereign, and ethical AI services for government and regulated sectors. Amid a rising need for digital advancement in public organizations, H2O.ai aims to navigate challenges related to data sovereignty and compliance. The company's focus on providing safe and responsible AI solutions aligns with the growing demand for enhanced technologies in the public sector.

data.title: LINK's institutional longs at 73% signal a potential breakout to $11.50 from $9.36 base in 3 weeks, fueled by oracle adoption surge.
data.description: With institutional long positions comprising 73% of LINK's current value at $9.36, a potential upward movement is anticipated. The resistance break is expected to trigger a rise towards $11.50, driven by increasing adoption of oracle services.

data.title: NEURA Robotics and Amazon Web Services Enter Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Physical AI at Scale
data.description: In METZINGEN, Germany, NEURA Robotics (NEURA) and Amazon Web Services (AWS) have revealed a strategic partnership aimed at advancing Physical AI on a large scale. This collaboration will facilitate the creation of cognitive robots capable of perceiving, reasoning, and operating alongside humans, moving them from the development phase to global implementation. By merging NEURA's cognitive robotics platform with AWS's cloud and AI capabilities, the companies plan to expedite the training, validation, and deployment of the upcoming cohort of smart robots. This partnership addresses a critical aspect of the tech industry, with a focus on advancing the proliferation of intelligent robots.

data.title: OMRON and Dassault Systèmes Partner to Revolutionize Manufacturing with Virtual and Real Integration
data.description: France-based Dassault Systèmes and Japan-based OMRON have teamed up to connect information technology (IT) and operational technology (OT). This partnership, involving companies listed on Euronext Paris (FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA) and the Tokyo Stock Exchange (TSE:6645), aims to enhance manufacturing processes. By combining their expertise, they plan to assist manufacturers and machine builders in creating and implementing more efficient production systems. This collaboration focuses on designing, simulating, and implementing smarter, more adaptable, and higher-performing systems by integrating IT and OT seamlessly.

data.title: Barnes Molding Solutions Becomes SPECTRIX
data.description: Barnes Molding Solutions, based in Lawrenceville, Ga., has rebranded as SPECTRIX. The new brand combines the injection molding capabilities of their leading brands - Männer, Foboha, Synventive, Priamus, Thermoplay, and Gammaflux. This change, unveiled at Chinaplas 2026, signifies the integration of key technologies under one roof covering part design, material science, hot runner and mold technology, sensors and controls, and injection molding. The transition marks a strategic move towards consolidated operations within the organization.

data.title: RIIG Technology, Inc. (dba HOOTL™) Announces Successful Close of $6M+ Million Series A to Accelerate AI-Driven Healthcare and Infrastructure Solutions
data.description: HOOTL™ (Humans Out of the Loop™), a technology company based in Charlottesville, Virginia, has completed a successful Series A financing round, raising over $6 million.

data.title: Ryobi Systems Establishes a New Investment Management Subsidiary in Singapore
data.description: In December 2025, Ryobi Systems Co., Ltd. launched Ryobi International Investment Pte. Ltd., a new investment management subsidiary based in Singapore. Operations commenced in March 2026, with the goal of driving business expansion through investments in Southeast Asia and strengthening Ryobi Group's worldwide presence. Singapore was chosen as a key location in Asia due to its status as a hub for talent and information within the region. The company aims to leverage this strategic position to facilitate growth and development in the region.
